name: loom
description: Multi-agent development orchestration platform â€” 22 specialists, 4-phase orchestration, native parallel subagents, persistent sessions, and standalone review/debug/security/perf/seo/a11y/compliance commands

settings.name: Heavy Model Alias
settings.description: The virtual model name or deployment ID for complex reasoning tasks (default: loom-heavy).

settings.name: Light Model Alias
settings.description: The virtual model name or deployment ID for utility and lightweight tasks (default: loom-light).

settings.name: Disabled Agents
settings.description: Comma-separated list of agent names to exclude from implementation planning.

settings.name: Max Retries
settings.description: Maximum retry attempts per phase before escalating to user.

settings.name: Auto Archive
settings.description: Automatically archive session state on successful completion (true/false).

settings.name: State Directory
settings.description: Base directory for session state and plans (default: docs/loom).

settings.name: Max Concurrent
settings.description: Maximum subagents emitted in one native parallel batch turn (0 = dispatch the entire ready batch).

settings.name: Execution Mode
settings.description: Phase 3 execution mode: 'parallel' (native concurrent subagents), 'sequential' (one at a time), or 'ask' (prompt each time). Default: ask.
